backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining persistent storage and CRUD operations for contact requests, episodes, characters, and general content, with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (admin dashboard, episodes/characters/content management panels) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's component and hook structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including sidebar and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that sets the page title to 'Whispers of the White Moon' and mounts the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/RUN-LOCAL-AND-DEPLOY-IC.md: Step-by-step guide covering prerequisites, local development setup, and Internet Computer mainnet deployment for the 'Whispers of the White Moon' anime website, including troubleshooting tips.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that routes to AdminDashboard for the /admin path or renders the full public-facing site with all sections, TopNav, Footer, and a shared React Query client.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Simple section component that renders the anime series synopsis from animeSiteConfig with a SectionHeader and readable prose styling.
frontend/src/components/AdminCharactersP: Admin panel component for managing characters, displaying a list with add/edit/delete actions backed by React Query hooks and confirmation dialogs via shadcn AlertDialog.
frontend/src/components/AdminContactRequ: Admin panel component for viewing, filtering, and managing contact form submissions. Supports toggling processed/pending status and exporting requests as CSV.
frontend/src/components/AdminContentPane: Admin panel for listing, adding, editing, and deleting content entries (announcements, lore, etc.). Delegates create/edit to a ContentForm component.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Top-level admin dashboard that handles Internet Identity login/logout, admin access verification, and renders the appropriate section panel via a sidebar navigation.
frontend/src/components/AdminEpisodesPan: Admin panel for listing, adding, editing, and deleting episodes sorted by season and episode number. Delegates create/edit to an EpisodeForm component.
frontend/src/components/AdminRolePanel.t: Admin panel for role management that displays the current user's principal ID and allows granting admin roles to other users by principal ID.
frontend/src/components/AdminSection.tsx: Admin panel component that handles authentication via Internet Identity, displays and manages contact requests (filter, export, toggle status), and allows granting admin roles to other principals.
frontend/src/components/AdminSidebar.tsx: Sidebar navigation component for the admin dashboard with links to Episodes, Characters, Content, Contact Requests, and Role Management sections, supporting both desktop and mobile (overlay) layouts.
frontend/src/components/CharacterForm.ts: Form component for creating or editing a character, using react-hook-form with fields for name, role, bio, image URL, weapon, power, and traits, wired to create/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/CharacterMatchQu: Multi-step personality quiz component with 7 questions that collects trait-tagged answers and computes a character match score against the anime site's character roster.
frontend/src/components/CharacterMatchRe: Displays the quiz result showing the matched character's details (image, bio, weapon, personality, power state) along with a match percentage progress bar and a restart button.
frontend/src/components/CharacterMatchSe: Section wrapper that manages the three quiz states (not-started, in-progress, completed) and renders the intro card, CharacterMatchQuiz, or CharacterMatchResult accordingly.
frontend/src/components/CharactersSectio: Renders a grid of anime character cards using data from animeSiteConfig, displaying each character's image, metadata, bio, weapon, and power state with conditional image rendering logic.
frontend/src/components/ClansSection.tsx: Displays a grid of seven elemental clans with their sigil images, names, and descriptions, using hardcoded clan data.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Renders a contact form with email, topic, and message fields, with validation and submission via a mutation hook that shows toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/ContentForm.tsx: A form component for creating or editing content entries (announcements, lore, news, etc.) using react-hook-form, with create/update mutation hooks and toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/EpisodeForm.tsx: A form component for creating or editing episode records with fields for title, description, URLs, and season/episode numbers, using react-hook-form and mutation hooks.
Renders a list of anime episodes from animeSiteConfig; clicking an episode selects it and scrolls to the video section.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright year, a YouTube channel link, and a Cash App donation handle.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, site title/tagline, and two CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to the 'about' and 'characters' sections respectively.
frontend/src/components/IntroSection.tsx: Displays an introduction video (iframe or native video depending on URL type) with a fallback external link button, plus the site tagline and first synopsis paragraph.
frontend/src/components/RewardsSection.t: Donation section showing a Cash App handle and a list of reward tiers (with icons, donation ranges, and perks) pulled from the site config.
frontend/src/components/SectionHeader.ts: Simple reusable component that renders a centered section title with a decorative accent underline.
frontend/src/components/TopNav.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links to all page sections, a mobile hamburger menu, and a conditional admin dashboard link shown only to authenticated admins.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: Video player section that displays either a selected episode or the default video source, with error handling and a fallback external link button.
frontend/src/components/WorldbuildingSec: Renders multiple worldbuilding subsections (clans, clan eyes, power system, rank system, Shiranagi family) from the site config as styled cards.
frontend/src/content/animeSiteConfig.ts: Central configuration object for the 'Whispers of the White Moon' anime site, containing site metadata, synopsis, CTA buttons, intro video URLs, donation reward tiers, and detailed worldbuilding data (clans, power system, rank system, character backgrounds).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an anonymous or identity-authenticated actor and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for all backend interactions including contact form submission, admin operations (check role, list requests, grant role), user profiles, episodes, characters, and content CRUD.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a manga/ink-on-paper Tailwind theme with light/dark CSS custom properties, typography using Noto Serif JP and Inter fonts, custom scrollbar styles, and a scoped dark admin dashboard theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/normalizeIntroEmbedUr: Utility function that converts YouTube and Vimeo share/watch URLs into embed-friendly iframe URLs, leaving direct video file URLs unchanged.
frontend/src/utils/scrollToSection.ts: Utility function that smoothly scrolls the page to a DOM element by ID with a configurable pixel offset.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch variables), border radii, shadows, fonts, and accordion animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the anime content management platform project, listing existing features (admin dashboard, episodes/characters/content management panels, dark-themed UI) and new feature requests with versioning and architectural notes.
